Extension of Duty-Free Period UntilDecember 31, 1955, , provided that the duty-free treatment of this section was to be applied in lieu of section 1252(a)(1), (2) of this title for Philippine articles entered or withdrawn from United States warehouses for consumption during periods between and provided the President declared by proclamation that such period was one in which United States articles were admitted into the Philippines free of ordinary customs duties.Act July 5, 1954, ch. 45968 Stat. 448July 3, 1954December 31, 1955

Proc. No. 3060. Extension of the Period of Duty-Free TreatmentProc. No. 3060, , 19 F.R. 4397, provided that United States articles entered or withdrawn from warehouse in the Philippines for consumption, during the period from to , be admitted into the Philippines free from ordinary customs duty.July 10, 1954July 4, 1954December 31, 1955
